settings.intro_text: Used by professional musicians on stages worldwide. Earasers are the only earplugs to have won the MusicRadar Best Music Earplug award five years in a row — 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023 and 2024.

settings.question: Will music still sound clear with Earasers in?
settings.answer: Yes — Earasers use a flat V-filter that reduces all frequencies equally. The music sounds exactly the same, just at a safer volume. No muffling, no bass-heavy sound.

settings.question: How long do the filters last?
settings.answer: Filters last 3–6 months with regular use. When they wear out, you can replace just the filter — no need to buy a whole new pair. Replacement filters are available in our shop.
